headCommit: the RC commits following 32ba7ef on structured-family-editors-unified (see git log)

versionDecision: Cargo.toml bumped to 0.2.0-rc.1 (cargo supports semver prereleases; verified by cargo check and a clean release build); the final 0.2.0 bump happens only with the user-approved stable release
metadataUpdated: AppStream metainfo releases entry 0.2.0~rc.1 (type development) + 0.1.0 backfill; appstreamcli validate passed

rcTagDecision.reason: the tag gates require a clear repo prerelease-tag convention; the repo has exactly one release tag (v0.1.0) and no prerelease precedent, so no RC tag was created
rcTagDecision.remainingStep: if wanted: an annotated v0.2.0-rc.1 tag on the reviewed commit, mirroring the v0.1.0 tag style, then push the tag

mergeDecision: main stays untouched; the merge belongs to the user-approved final release
validation: cargo fmt, cargo fmt --check, cargo check, cargo test (full suite, all ok), jq empty data/reports/*.json, git diff --check, cargo build --release, appstreamcli validate, desktop-file-validate, bash -n on the builder - all green
